## Summary

Describe the change in one or two sentences.

## Outcome Improved

Check the main outcome this change improves:

- [ ] understand
- [ ] try
- [ ] trust
- [ ] share

## Consistency Check

- [ ] Uses ACH as the public product name
- [ ] Keeps guard-mode and continuity-mode as internal modes
- [ ] Does not introduce a second public product name
- [ ] Updates examples or docs if behavior-facing wording changed

## Validation

List checks run, or explain why validation was not needed.
